## [03:02 - 06:05]

one call throw me into a slump for a week so I don't want that to happen to you guys. And so I had a client ask me this question yesterday and I taught this to him and he thought it was super valuable so I want to teach it to you guys. And basically there's two things. The first thing, and so I teach my clients an end of day routine and part of that routine is journaling.
